we expect this segment’s backlog to remain strong during 2018.

factors.summary: Demand trends are positive, with accelerating demand driven by favorable end-market conditions, particularly in renewable energy and natural gas generation. However, demand experiences seasonal fluctuations, with the first quarter typically being the lowest due to weather and customer budgeting, and the third quarter being the highest.

evidence.text: Our revenues are lowest in the first quarter of the year because cold, snowy or wet conditions can cause delays on projects. Third quarter revenues are typically the highest of the year, as a greater number of projects are underway, and weather is normally more accommodating.
evidence.subsection: Seasonality; Fluctuations of Results; Economic Conditions

evidence.text: We believe there are growth opportunities across the industries we serve and continue to have a positive long-term outlook. Overall, favorable end-market drivers have spurred demand for infrastructure services in both our Electric Power Infrastructure Services and Oil and Gas Infrastructure Services segments, and we believe both segments are generally in a renewed multi-year up-cycle.
We expect demand for electricity in North America to grow over the long term... transmission and substation infrastructure will be needed to interconnect new natural gas-fired generation facilities.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Favorable end-market conditions and a positive long-term outlook drive demand growth.

factors.summary: Construction activity and infrastructure spending are growing, driving demand across multiple segments. Both the Electric Power Infrastructure Services and Oil and Gas Infrastructure Services segments are experiencing favorable end-market conditions, indicating a renewed multi-year up-cycle.

evidence.text: Favorable end-market drivers have spurred demand for infrastructure services in both our Electric Power Infrastructure Services and Oil and Gas Infrastructure Services segments, and we believe both segments are generally in a renewed multi-year up-cycle.
As demand for power increases, we expect the need for new power generation facilities to also increase...

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Growth in construction activity and infrastructure spending, coupled with favorable end-market conditions, indicate a strong up-cycle.
